## Summary

Briefly describe the bug and the fix in this pull request.

## Issue

What was broken, and how did it show up for users or developers?

## Root Cause

Explain the underlying cause of the bug.

## Fix

Describe what changed to resolve the issue.

## Scope

- Area: `frontend` / `backend` / `docs` / `infra`
- Related issue(s):
- Environment affected: `local` / `staging` / `production`

## Testing

- [ ] Reproduced the bug before the fix
- [ ] Verified the fix locally
- [ ] Added or updated automated tests
- [ ] Checked for regressions

## Risk And Rollout Notes

Call out any migration steps, follow-up work, or areas reviewers should watch closely.

## Screenshots Or Logs

Add screenshots, logs, stack traces, or example requests/responses if relevant.

## Additional Context

Anything else that will help reviewers validate the fix.
